author: droodotfoo
content:
Working on ERC-8262: ZK Compliance Oracles would appreciate any feedback! https://ethereum-magicians.org/t/erc-8262-zero-knowledge-compliance-oracle/28543
https://github.com/ethereum/ERCs/pull/1747

We intend to use this in xochi.fi, an intents dark pool that uses stealth address/aztec shielded notes for privacy. To be solarpunk-clear you don't have to KYC on the platform at all to get benefits of privacy for you and your agents, it only provides more features/better rates.
